title: Support class objects as function return values

features.name: function returning class object type
features.description: Code should include a function that returns a class object type, where the return type is a class rather than a primitive or dynamic array
features.snippet:
class foo; endclass
function foo create_foo(); return new(); endfunction

features.name: function return value assigned to class object
features.description: Code should include assignment of a function return value to a class-typed variable, where the function returns a class object

features.name: dynamic array initialized with single value expression
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array or queue initialized with a single value expression, which requires element width to be calculated for proper evaluation
